programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Smokey, a specially trained dog, aids the Zeo Rangers in fighting Digster, Mondo and Machina's latest monster.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Mondo and Machina hatch a plan to control the children's minds, by planting a transmitter on the Puppet Man.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lothor's minions appeal to Tori's vanity.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The others question Dustin's commitment to the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Thunder Rangers use the Tsunami Cycles and their Thunder Megazord to try and defeat the Wind Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers seek one of the Corona Aurora gems in the underwater ruins of Atlantis.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Dax rescues a girl named Mira from a monster attack, and quickly they become a couple.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The mysterious new Org General Necronomica fights the Rangers while Merrick finds a new home.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Alyssa helps Cole search for information on his long-lost parents.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Cam must use all the Rangers' power disks to summon a new weapon strong enough to defeat Wolfblades.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tori finds herself in a bizarre dimension where everything is the opposite of what she knows.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The DinoThunder Rangers storm the island base on a mission to rescue Tommy from Mesogog's clutches.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kira's old singing partner, the now famous Kylee Styles comes to town.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Ethan is zapped into a video game.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zedd creates some underwater monsters to scare a young swimmer.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Shockblast disables Cybertron's energon grid, as Kicker urges the Autobots to heed Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starved for energon, both Unicron's head and body begin lashing out at their respective captors.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron commands Shockblast to lead an assault on Cybertron to take out the Energon towers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When Dinobot Scowl goes on a rampage, Grimlock briefly ponders a return to old habits.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Bee Team allies with Windblade, another Decepticon-hunting Autobot, to take on Zizza.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An educational trip turns into a Decepticon hunt as Bee and the Bots stumble upon the shape-shifter Pseudo.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: As the Decepticons are not responsible for the recent treachery, the Autobots want to find out who is it.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The evil five-faced Quintessons forge a dark alliance with the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Rodimus Prime seeks the true nature of the Quintessons and comes to a terrifying realization.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Great battles rage. Blurr and Wheelie must complete a desperate mission, or Earth will be lost.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron uses the Energon to revive Tidal Wave into Mirage.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Tthe Autobots fought their way to Megatron within Unicron's body.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting Tthe Message
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? Moretwisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! TheFriends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into afrantic race against time when Emma discovers that herinnocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- atext that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma'sundying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma'sBFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew'sphone and erase the text before he reads it. But first,they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angrybrute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show – in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day – Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights – the Tighty Knighties – are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks “How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero.” But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament – she's agreed to be in “princess mode” for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls – until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Monster Chef
programme.desc: Axl and Chef Éclair must enter a cooking contest to try to keep Jestro from getting the hottest chili recipe in the realm. Knighton celebrity chef GOBBLETON RAMBLEY announces that he's developed the hottest chili recipe ever created. Now, he intends to give the recipe to the winner of his “Hottest Chili Cook-Off Competition” cooking show on Knighton TV. He'll turn over his famous Chili Cookbook with the hottest chili recipe on the last page. It's so unique it can't be recreated without it. Jestro and the Book of Monsters think they MUST have that recipe. “Hot chili makes hot monsters!” Merlok knows that this recipe, in the wrong hands – meaning Jestro's – could be dangerous. But when the Knights appeal to the egomaniacal chef, he says the only way to get the recipe is to win it from him. So Axl and Chef Éclair decide to enter. The team that creates the hottest chili will win Rambley's cookbook. Chef Éclair is unsure that Axl has the skills to help them win the competition, but, as we see through funny cooking show bits, Axl is quite good and they become a pretty good team. (We will also learn that years ago, Rambley stole one of Éclair's best recipes and they don't like each other.) While watching the multi-part competition, Aaron and Lance have a contest of their own: who can eat the hottest chili. Axl and Éclair actually win the competition, coming up with a raging hot chili recipe. Before they can claim their prize, Jestro and his monsters attack with Magmar leading the way on his siege tower. They must get that cookbook! During the battle, Rambley's cookbook is accidentally melted. After the battle, Rambley announces his new quest: to make the sweetest ice cream ever! While Axl and Éclair cook happily in the kitchen of the Fortrex, back in the Redoubt of Ruination, Jestro and Lavaria are attempting to recreate Rambley's chili recipe. They keep spooning various recipes of chili into the Book of Monsters. “Nope, not hot enough…waaaay too much garlic….you call that hot?!” (BELCH!)

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik decides to cripple Mobius' three major transit systems: Rail, Air, and Sea in order to fully gain control of the planet. Sonic has to circumnavigate the planet in order to save the day.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a robot coach -- the "Coachnik", to put S and G through a "Training Camp" to improve their skills. Then Coachnik puts a bomb in Grounder's head as a booby trap for Sonic, and a football game ensues with Grounder's head as the ball.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help out an Owl/Chilidog Diner owner, named Bert Whoo, when Robotnik uses his henchbots to try to collect protection money. When the henchbots prove to be no match for Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts inadvertantly creates a "super power" formula, when his janitor bucket spills in the lab. Robotnik falls into it and becomes "Super Robotnik", then challenges Sonic to a fight, with all of Mobius as the stakes. With Prof. Von...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik puts a meteor on a collision course with a village, Sonic is forced to compete in the Robolympics to save the village. After a series of wild, booby trapped events, Sonic is victorious.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: First in a four-part Time Travel series. Robotnik invents a time machine to go back in time and gather four powerful gemstones. His first attempt is on the high seas, but Sonic goes into hyper-Sonic-overdrive, and reverses time to go after him. ...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik goes back to medieval times, and enlists the help of Merlink the Magician to get his gemstone.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape. Allowing it past the barrier would mean unprecedented peril - not only for Slugterra, but our world above too!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra - unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang find themselves competing in the Slugball Championship - a rough and tumble cross between hockey, slugslinging and rugby - with deadly random obstacles thrown in for fun! Eli suspects the rival team is cheating, but he's going to have to prove it first... that is if he can survive the game!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell - a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to. Burpy can't make it on his own, so Eli vows to take him there. He convinces the Shadow Clan to point the way, but the journey is fraught with peril. Meanwhile the rest of the Shane Gang must fight side by side with the Shadow Clan when Blakk's minions attack.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk has been captured! Now it's up to the Shane Gang to transport him to Stalagmite 17, the only prison that can hold him. To do so, they're going to need some serious speed. That's just what they get when we reveal Kord's new modifications to their Mecha Beasts! But will it be enough to stand up to Blakk's own newly-designed super vehicles?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While the rest of the Shane Gang defend the perimeter from the legions of Blakk Guards sent to free Dr. Blakk from prison, Eli interogates the captured villain. Surprisingly, Blakk feels like talking. He reveals where he came from, how and why he discovered ghouls and most importantly of all, Eli learns the truth about what happened to his father.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli's got a new slug recruit! But in the heat of battle, can this rookie go from frightened novice to the hero of the day?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Dr. Blakk and his Darkbane minions have discovered a way to make their ghouls faster and stronger - giving them an edge over the Shane Gang. In order to even the odds, Eli is going to need his most powerful slugs and an upgraded blaster from Redhook. The only problem is, Dr. Blakk already has the slingersmith working for him... Eli and the gang attempt a daring rescue mission to free Redhook, but along the way discover Blakk has a much more sinister plan in the works.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang have vanquished Dr. Blakk. But a new threat emerges from beyond the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Dark Slinger and his marauders have invaded Slugterra! But there's more to this new threat than meets the eye. Eli must fight a very different kind of duel to save Slugterra...and himself.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A new member joins the Shane Gang! His name is Junjie, and he is a master of the mysterious slugslinging art of Slug Fu. But even with the power of five slingers, the Shane Gang find themselves in over their heads trying to protect the ancient Elemental Slugs.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: "Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Heroes of Envell
programme.desc: Present days. Saint Petersburg. Four friends – Art, Kira, Phil and Vic are the coolest gamers in school. Eventually they find a suspicious laptop with «Heroes of Envell» game installed on it. Turns out that this very laptop is a portal to another dimension, a game realm which is full of adventures and real-life danger. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. You start with a quest and then it becomes a race right until it all grows into a tricky brainteaser. But be sure about one thing – there is no boring or easy way in here. The game realm is a blend of medieval, steampunk and futurism. You never know what really awaits our heroes. Just like the design of the game, the game logic is very unpredictable. programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Caitie's Classroom: Magical Magnets

Caitie shows us how to use magnets to find treasure, to make a creative painting, and to perform magic tricks! We also go on a field trip to a scrap yard to see a big electromagnet grapple move a car!

programme.desc: When Chanterelle sees how good Lilit is at painting, she offers to help her dig into her talent. But Lilit's art lessons conflict with the fun project she has been working on with Mush-Mush and Chep.

programme.title: Mush-Mush and the Mushables

programme.title: Om Nom Stories: Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors
programme.sub-title: Paper Games / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Board Gamer / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Beach Fun
programme.desc: With paper, Om Nom and friends can create anything and travel anywhere! Especially to the world of imaginary adventures, their favourite! In this magic world, anyone can be a king, a pirate, a dragon, or a robot. Just put on a paper crown and go fight a dragon with paper wings, like Om Nom. / If Om Nom is taking out his board games, the fun is about to start! The stakes are high even in TicTacToe, and the challenge is harder than ever in Jenga! And, of course, Om Nom and Nibble Nom always bring the game to life as only they can! / When on the beach, Om Nom is busy: he wants to play, sit in the sun, and explore the many fun possibilities the beach offers. Like listening to the sea music in the seashells, building sand castles, or playing ball with friends! His friends of course make every activity more interesting!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories: Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors
programme.sub-title: SmartNom (Episode 221) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Nom on Wheels (Episode 222) / Om Nom Stories: New Neighbors - Hot Days (Episode 223)
programme.desc: Om Nom is having fun exploring the apps on his smartphone! He can do so many things – from playing with the camera to navigating in the neighbourhood, from sending emojis to playing virtual drums. Even get directions to the nearest yummy apple! / Om Nom is a master of wheels, he rides a skateboard, a scooter, a tricycle and roller skates. His friends are welcome to join the ride too! Even if this would require some adjustments, all problems are solvable! / When it is too hot outside, Om Nom will find ways to cool down and enjoy the sunny weather. He can splash in the water, hide from the sun in the shade, or turn on a fan. Especially if that fan has the power to turn him into a snowman! It's so great when your neighbor is an engineering genius!

programme.title: Kate & Mim-Mim: Boomer's New Pet / Gobble's Gizmos and Gadgets
programme.desc: Boomer has a frisky new critter friend that he wants to keep as a pet! But its hard shell and high speed are causing trouble all over Mimiloo! / When Gobbles garden starts to wilt, he worries that he's lost his touch as a gardener. He tries to take up inventing instead, like his best buddy Tack, but he still misses his plants!

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Young, tech-savvy Dot is a true child of the 21st century -- she is well-versed in technology and has a strong curiosity and thirst for knowledge. She uses electronic devices to help her learn, create and explore, but she always makes sure to unplug and enjoy quality time with friends, family and pet dog Scratch. She explores the world and goes on adventures with her buds, including best friend Hal, and pooch to satisfy her curiosity and find out more about what goes on around her. Dot gets her passion for technology from her techie mother, who develops apps, while her father is more old-school with a love for woodworking and would rather enjoy the simple things in life than be tethered to electronics. The animated series is based on a children's book written by technology advocate Randi Zuckerberg, who calls the titular character "relatable" and says she is "that friend we all have who is energetic, adventurous and imaginative."

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Joe Zimmerman grew up in Morgantown, West Virginia, and started his comedy career in North Carolina. While living in the South, his stand-up group the Beards of Comedy landed a record deal with Comedy Central Records.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Freaky Times in a Freaky World
programme.desc: Omaha's insightful view on multi-ethnic America has garnered him numerous tv appearances and places him in great demand. His stories are hailed by the Los Angeles Times as "Refreshing , funny and universal." His side-splitting jabs at the hypocrisy of Am

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he's likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago's prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Richard Sarvate quit his ten year programming career in Silicon Valley to be a stand up comedian. Oops! Now he spends his nights poking fun at tech jobs.

programme.title: Daniel Eachus
programme.desc: Daniel Eachus talks about weird jobs, strange fears, and how to prank restaurants all through the lens of being the lifelong skinny guy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: San Diego native Jesse Egan jokes about hitting on women in a smart car, hippie drive-bys, and the gluten free craze.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: The King Of Queens writer Dennis Regan comes swinging hard with his quick wit and flawless delivery. The laughs just keep on coming in "Dennisland".

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Lamuweri Guluka is an African name meaning “hard to pronounce on the first try.” Lam is a seasoned comedian who has performed at colleges, comedy clubs, and cafes all over the country whose background as a nerdy, suburban, black male gives him a unique comedic perspective that audiences love.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Matt Bergman talks about being bad at handhsakes, accidentally breaking into an elderly woman's house, and bombing as an opener for the Goo Goo Dolls with sharp and self-deprecating humor.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Award Winning Comedian Nazareth, has been seen by over 40 Million people around the world through live concerts, TV and Radio broadcasts. His list of TV appearances include: Comedy Central, ABC Family, NBC, CBS, and TBN.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: Nominated for 8 Academy Awards®. An unexpected bond forms between a formerly institutionalized man (Bradley Cooper) and a woman recovering from her own tragedy (Jennifer Lawrence).

programme.title: The Great Debaters
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Melvin B. Tolson, a professor from the historically black Wiley College in East Texas. In 1935, Tolson inspired students to form the college's first debating team, and led it to defeat Harvard in national championships.

programme.title: The Spy Next Door
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent offers to babysit his girlfriend's children, only to be harassed by a former enemy.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: An evil queen steals control of a kingdom and an exiled princess enlists the help of seven resourceful rebels to win back her birthright.

programme.title: Beatriz at Dinner
programme.desc: A provocative and sharply hilarious film about characters from vastly different sociopolitical backgrounds colliding over dinner.

programme.title: The Nanny Diaries
programme.desc: A recent college graduate takes on a nannying job in a snobby New York penthouse that requires more parenting than she could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: Nominated for 8 Academy Awards®. An unexpected bond forms between a formerly institutionalized man (Bradley Cooper) and a woman recovering from her own tragedy (Jennifer Lawrence).

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief (Nicolas Cage) frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Nick Wild (Jason Statham) is a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal professional skills and a personal gambling problem. When a friend is beaten by a sadistic thug, Nick strikes back, only to find out the thug is the son of a powerful mob boss. Suddenly Nick is plunged into the criminal underworld, chased by enforcers and wanted by the mob. Having raised the stakes, Nick has one last play to change his fortunes…and this time, it's all or nothing. From two-time Academy® Award winning writer William Goldman.

programme.title: Black Rock
programme.desc: Three childhood friends set aside their personal issues and reunite for a girls' weekend on a remote island off the coast of Maine. One wrong move turns their weekend getaway into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Stan Helsing
programme.desc: A video store clerk learns he is Stan Van Helsing, descendant of the famed monster killer, and must save his town by defeating the six greatest movie monsters of all time.

programme.title: Dredd
programme.desc: In the future, America is a dystopian wasteland. The latest scourge is Ma-Ma, a prostitute-turned-drug pusher with a dangerous new drug and aims to take over the city. The only possibility of stopping her is an elite group of urban police called Judges, who combine the duties of judge, jury and executioner to deliver a brutal brand of swift justice. But even the top-ranking Judge, Dredd (Karl Urban), discovers that taking down Ma-Ma isn't as easy as it seems in this explosive adaptation of the hugely popular comic series.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley is brilliant at organizing other people's engagements. When designing her most important proposal yet, will the man who could jeopardize it all be her very own prince charming?

programme.title: Swing Into Romance
programme.desc: A dancer (Danica McKellar) pairs with an unlikely partner (David Haydn-Jones), entering a contest to save her family's General Store.

programme.title: My Name Is Sarah
programme.desc: Sarah begins attending AA meetings at the community center, not because she's an alcoholic, but to meet Charlies – a handsome man she's seen going to the meetings. Sarah and Charlie begin to fall in love, but she'll need to muster up the courage to tell him that she's not an alcoholic, knowing that she may lose him as a result.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany is heartbroken when her fiancée calls off their wedding and her frenemy snaps up her cancellations. Tiffany convinces actor Nicholas to be her 'fiancée' in return for signing to her agency.

programme.title: Falling for the Competition
programme.desc: Molly runs the local mom's group and this year they're entering the prestigious Modern Parenting Group of the Year award, but don't expect to be facing off against a local dad's group for the prize.

programme.desc: Hallmark Movie. A marriage therapist tries to fix her marriage by trying to change her husband.

programme.title: Falling From Grace

programme.title: A New Leaf
programme.desc: Henry Graham, a confirmed bachelor with a zest for luxuries, receives the shocking news that he is now broke. Henry's spirits are low as he returns to his town-house to discuss the situation with his butler, Harold who suggests marriage as a way out.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: King Creole

programme.title: Serenity
programme.desc: A renegade crew agrees to hide a fugitive with a deadly secret aboard their ship.

programme.title: Christmas In New York
programme.desc: In the vein of Love Actually, the story follows six different couples in a posh Manhattan hotel over the course of one night just before Christmas.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: Holiday Breakup VOD

programme.title: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: With the threat of having to close her father's candy store, Wendy and her six-year-old daughter Grace travel to the big city in hopes of making extra holiday cash to save the store.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: It's Christmas in York. Jules, 16, knows all she and her dad really need for Christmas is love. Jules attempts to set up her dad online with a girlfriend - what could go wrong? Plenty...

programme.title: Love on the Reef
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a laissez-faire dive instructor must team up to save their beloved reef.

programme.title: Food for the Heart
programme.desc: After taking on too much with her meal delivery service, Lia accepts her neighbor Eli's help.

programme.title: Falling For the Competition
programme.desc: A local mom's and dad's group clash for the prestigious Modern Parenting Group of the Year award.

programme.title: The Love Advisor
programme.desc: An assistant secretly writing love advice for her boss risks her career for a handsome journalist.

programme.title: The Kissing Bandit
programme.desc: After some bedroom issues, Dale Saunders, get kicked to the curb by his wife. One stormy night to his delight, a gorgeous redhead in distress shows up at his new pad and rekindles his lost lust. While she promises to fulfill his secret sexual fantasy, she prowls at night making the same promise to other men she seduces and rips-off with the help of an accomplice. When the media warns the public, Atlanta is swept with Kissing Bandit fever.

programme.title: Induced
programme.desc: An expectant couple heads to a remote cabin to have a natural childbirth, but comes under attack from a predatory midwife who will stop at nothing to snatch their unborn child from them.

programme.title: Keisha
programme.desc: Keisha always had a problem finding a decent job in her community. Financial hardship gets worse for her and her son after her grandmother dies and only leaves behind a Bible. Struggling to take care of her son and pay bills she turns to a job at a strip club. It's all to get a new life in a new city and away from the blackmailing child protective services agent. What sacrifices will she make for her and her son?

programme.title: Concealment
programme.desc: A young married couple has a friend from college visit them, who is in distress. She has a huge secret which ultimately spirals into a domino effect of more secrets, sex, corruption, murder and concealing the truth.

programme.title: The Pumpkin Karver
programme.desc: Last Halloween, Alec (David J. Wright) decided to dress up as a masked killer and scare the daylights out of his girlfriend, Lynn (Amy Weber). Unfortunately for him, Lynn's brother Jonathan (Michael Zara) took the joke seriously and stabbed Alex to death with a pumpkin carver. This Halloween won't provide much of a respite from bloodshed. Although they've moved to a new town, brother and sister soon find themselves fighting for their lives against a very familiar masked murderer.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: In this crime thriller, mercenary John Seeger (Steven Seagal, "Exit Wounds") attempts to break into Eastern Europe's most impenetrable prison and free the son of a notorious drug lord.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: While investigating the "accidental" death of his partner, a New Orleans police officer plunges into the city's criminal underworld. Starring Val Kilmer ("The Doors") and 50 Cent.

programme.title: Blood Lake: Attack of the Killer Lampreys
programme.desc: After chomping through massive fish populations, thousands of starved lampreys begin attacking the citizens of a sleepy lake town, leaving the community scrambling to stay alive. Starring Shannen Doherty, Jason Brooks and Christopher Lloyd.

programme.title: Shark Attack
programme.desc: When marine biologist Steven McKray (Casper Van Dien) learns that a friend died in a mysterious shark attack in South Africa, he decides to find out what really happened. Upon arriving in the village, he meets Lawrence Rhodes (Ernie Hudson), a local hotel owner, and scientist Miles Craven (Bentley Mitchum), who informs Steven of the mysterious increase in shark attacks in the area. When Steven teams up with his late friend's sister for a fact-finding dive, they make a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: In this crime-drama, a notorious gangster must reconcile his past in order to make a future for his son.

programme.title: Blood Lake: Attack of the Killer Lampreys
programme.desc: After chomping through massive fish populations, thousands of starved lampreys begin attacking the citizens of a sleepy lake town, leaving the community scrambling to stay alive. Starring Shannen Doherty, Jason Brooks and Christopher Lloyd.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Idris Muhammad, Curtis Fuller, Joe Henderson & Kenny Drew
programme.desc: This assemblage of authentic luminaries recreates the sound of Paris in the 50's and 60's when the City of Light was Europe's mecca for American jazz musicians. The Paris Reunion Band was formed as homage to Kenny Clarke and the spirit of his fellow Paris jazzmen.

programme.title: Georgie Fame, Dave Cliff, James Powell & Brian Odjeas
programme.desc: Georgie Fame, known for "Yeh, Yeh" and "The Ballad of Bonnie and Clyde" makes a triumphant comeback with The Blue Flames. Georgie Fame and the Blue Flames was a popular band in the UK in the '60s, celebrated for its R&B, soul, jazz, ska, and pop sounds. The training was largely inspired by ska, a popular musical style in Jamaican cafes in London at the time. It was the song "Green Onions" from the Booker T & The MG that inspired Georgie to incorporate the Hammond organ into her compositions. This performance by Georgie Fame and the Blue Flames is brimming with blues and soulful sounds that will delight the group's old and new fans.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.sub-title: Robert Sadin/Avishai Cohen, Song for My Brother
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ

programme.title: Chet Baker, Frank Sinatra, Dizzy Gillespie & Tony Bennett
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential male jazz and pop vocalists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Delight in the expressive beauty and emotional depth of Chet Baker's rendition of “Time After Time” and “You Don't Know What Love Is", recorded live in Brussels, Belgium in 1964 and in Rome, Italy in 1956 respectively. Revel in Frank Sinatra's iconic version of “I've Got You Under My Skin". Immerse yourself in Dizzy Gillespie's dynamic performance of “Let Me Outta Here”, recorded live in Denmark in 1970. Enjoy Tony Bennett's unforgettable performance of “It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing)” at London's majestic Royal Albert Hall in 1974. Let the haunting beauty of Nat King Cole's 1957 performance of “Autumn Leaves” and Louis Armstrong's performance of “Basin Street Blues” from 1959 delight you. Dean Martin's smooth vocal stylings will enthrall you as he performs the jazz standard “Wrap Your Troubles In Dreams". Witness the electrifying energy of Sammy Davis Jr.'s performance of “Too Close For Comfort”. Join us for this unforgettable musical experience that you'll surely cherish!

programme.title: Bill Evans, Chuck Israels & Larry Bunker
programme.sub-title: Bill Evans' European Tour: Live in '64, '65 & '70
programme.desc: Bill Evans: Live in '64, '65 & '70 features five separate performances by one of the most revered pianists in music history. This collection covers an 11-year span, highlighting Evans' ever-deepening artistry as he performs with four different all-star rhythm sections, including the stunning duo of bassist Niels-Henning Ørsted Pedersen and drummer Alan Dawson. This recording includes Evans' renditions of the rarely performed “Sareen Jurer,” “Blue Serge”, and “Twelve Tone Tune Two.” Among the many surprises in this collection is a live performance of “My Melancholy Baby” with saxophonist Lee Konitz.

programme.title: Stochelo Rosenberg & Peter Beets
programme.desc: The treasured compositions of guitarist Django Reinhardt, the founding father of hot club jazz, are engraved in everyone's memory. Although Reinhardt missed two fingers of his left hand, his virtuoso technique was unrivalled. Dutch guitarist Stochelo Rosenberg and pianist Peter Beets now have the pleasure to bring Django's music back to life with their infectious improvisations.

programme.title: Yes
programme.desc: "Songs From Tsongas" is a live performance from Yes' 35th Anniversary Tour in 2004, the last tour by the band to feature the classic line-up of Jon Anderson, Steve Howe, Chris Squire, Rick Wakeman and Alan White.

programme.title: Rodolfo Mederos, Otros Aires, Teresa Parodi & Café de los Maestros
programme.desc: For the audience in the famous ballroom El Palacio in Buenos Aires, the year 2012 began with tango rhythms and Argentinean folk music. This festive broadcast opens with a tango performance by dance partners Eduardo and Gloria, accompanied by the renowned ensemble Café de los Maestros. Another highlights is a performance by bandoneon player Rodolfo Mederos and his trio. In addition, the concert features a performance by Teresa Parodi, former lead singer of the Astor Piazzolla Band, accompanied by the Fernando Suárez Paz Quintet. Also on the bill is the contemporary electronic tango formation Otros Aires. Founded by Miguel Di Genova in 2003, Otros Aires combines electronic rhythms and traditional tango instruments, such as the bandoneon, piano, and guitar. On the program are compositions by Astor Piazzolla, Pedro Maffia, Pedro Laurenz, Gustavo Mozzi, and many others. Enjoy this concert of music and dance, featuring some of Argentine's tango scene's finest artists!

programme.title: Federico Guglielmo & Roberto Loreggian
programme.sub-title: Works by Matteis, Tartini, Bach & Vivaldi
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Federico Guglielmo (violin) and Roberto Loreggian (harpsichord) present Baroque music. On the program are Nicola Matteis's Passaggio rotto e Andamento veloce per violino solo (from Ayres for the Violini), Giuseppe Tartini's Sonata in G minor Op. 1 No. 10 (B.g10) “Didone abbandonata”, J. S. Bach's Concerto in F major for solo harpsichord, BWV 978 (a transcription of Antonio Vivaldi's Violin Concerto in G major, Op. 3 No. 3, RV 310), and Vivaldi's Sonata IV in D major, RV 755.

programme.title: Quatuor Ebène
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - String Quartet No. 7 & 13, and Op. 133
programme.desc: Renowned French string quartet Quatuor Ébène marked the 250th birth anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven (1770-1827) with a remarkable project: recording all of the great composer's sixteen string quartets. For five years, violinists Pierre Colombet and Gabriel Le Magadure, violist Marie Chilemme, and cellist Raphaël Merlin immersed themselves in Beethoven's 650 pages of sheet music. Their efforts culminated in the performance of the composer's complete repertoire for string quartet, which covers three decades of Beethoven's musical creativity, during six impressive concerts at Philharmonie de Paris in the autumn of 2020. Quatuor Ébène explored every facet of Beethoven's string quartet repertoire: from the youthful Opus 18 string quartets to the Razumovsky, Harp, and Serioso quartets (Opus 59, 74, and 95) from his middle period, and finally, the depth of his late quartets (Opus 127 to 135). This program features Quatuor Ébène performing Beethoven's String Quartet No. 7 in F major, Op. 59, No. 1, known as “Razumovsky” String Quartet No. 13 in B-flat major, Op. 130 and the monumental Great Fugue, Op. 133. This concert performance was recorded at Philharmonie de Paris on October 12, 2020.

programme.title: Julie Berthollet, Camille Berthollet, Guillaume Vincent & Ensemble Appassionato
programme.sub-title: Berthollet Sisters at Théâtre des Champs-Élysées
programme.desc: For this exceptional recital, recorded in 2019 at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, Camille (cello) and Julie Berthollet (violin) are accompanied by pianist Guillaume Vincent and the Ensemble Appassionato under the direction of Mathieu Herzog. The two musical sisters have chosen a repertoire which crosses genres and eras to explore the expressive palette of the violin and cello, from the baroque of Vivaldi to the jazzy notes of Django Reinhardt and Stéphane Grapelli. Among the works on the program are Brahms Hungarian Dances No. 5 and No. 6, Karl Jenkins' Palladio, 'Theme from Forrest Gump' by Alan Silvestri, Schumann's Piano Quintet, Op. 44, The Red Violin by Corigliano, Hungarian Rhapsody, op. 68 by Popper, Minor Swing by Reinhardt/Grappeli and Csárdás by Monti.

programme.title: Volver a Amar

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder

programme.title: El Amor Frente al Poder

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo

programme.title: La Familia de mi Esposo
programme.desc: La Familia de mi Esposo - Las Secretas Intenciones De Şeniz: Fulden encuentra a Şeniz discutiendo con el falso Engin y termina contándole toda la verdad. Pelin cuestiona a Hakan sobre una presunta amante.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Control: Kerim no es el único que vuelve al lugar donde ocurrieron los hechos esa fatídica noche. Fatmagül y su familia se cambian de casa. Selim y Meltem se encuentran y el hijo de Rafad pierde el control.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Visita en la Cárcel: Mukaddes sigue intentando que la acepten. Asu Des vuelve a Estambul y ve a Sami. Kadir le avisa a Fatmagül que por fin podrá visitar a Kerim en la cárcel.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Alegría: Mukaddes extraña demasiado a Murat. Kadir y Eve Nine pasan un tiempo solos hablando de su pasado. Fatmagül por fin baja la guardia ante Kerim y se permite disfrutar el momento.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Denuncia: Fatmagül intenta poner una denuncia en contra de Mustafá. Mukaddes se da cuenta de algo que cambiará su futuro de por vida. Los Yaşaran cada vez tienen más problemas.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Presión: Mustafá va a hablar con Turaner Alagöz y le dice lo que escuchó. Munir intenta presionar a Asu Des. Mukaddes va a ver a Murat. Kerim hace algo que podría afectar el caso.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Sorpresa: Kerim le adelanta su sorpresa de cumpleaños a Fatmagül. Meltem va a despedirse de Mustafá. Rasad se da cuenta de que su plan para hundir a Turaner no funcionará.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül? - Cumpleaños: Fatmagül festeja su cumpleaños acompañada de amigos y familia. Mukaddes comienza a sospechar de Salih. Fatmagül recibe los resultados de su examen.

programme.title: El Árbol
programme.desc: Doña Lucha descubre un árbol mágico del que "florecen" hogazas de pan en lugar de frutas. Llevada por la codicia, comienza a vender el pan.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?

programme.title: Teresa: Celos
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Paulo que le duele verlo con Aída. Armando le dice a Teresa que Mariano usó el anillo de compromiso para ayudarlo a pagar una deuda. Paulo decide terminar su relación con Aída.

programme.title: Rubí: Falso amor

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Gran encuentro

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: En secreto

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Noche de pasión

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando regresa del casino y le muestra a María que no se gastó el dinero de su padre y le dice cosas bonitas para volver a enamorarla. Fernando sufre un ataque al corazón al saber que Luis Fernando tiene deudas de juego.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Manuel entristece al saber que Guillermo está internado en el hospital. Magnolia idea un plan para evitar que Guillermo muera. Candy le promete a Meche que la ayudará a sacar a Guillermo del hospital.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Guillermo ya está fuera de peligro, pero pronto se lo llevarán a la cárcel Meche se pone muy feliz al descubrir que está embarazada.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Renato le confiesa a Sergio que mató a Nicandro, que Marimar es inocente y que fue inculpada por Angélica. Bella le informa a Bernardo que ella se hará cargo de las finanzas del club.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: El gobernador está muy interesado en Bella y él le cuenta que Sergio planea casarse con su hija Rodolfo San Genis planea una fiesta para robarse a Bella.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Cynthia idea un nuevo plan para deshacerse de Ana Paula. Vanesa le hace creer a Rogelio que le interesa encontrar a Margarito solo para poder acercarse a él. Ana Paula le confiesa a Rogelio que el hijo que espera es de Gustavo.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Violeta entristece al saber que su operación no fue exitosa. Alejandro prepara todo para casarse cuanto antes con Antonia. Candela enfrenta a Violeta para confesarle que José María no la ama.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Pablo y Lía se ponen de novios. Violeta se pone celosa al encontrar a Candela en casa de José Maria. Justino amenaza a Antonia con matar a Alejandro si sigue con la idea de casarse con él. Max trata de besar a Violeta a la fuerza.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino va a buscar al hotel al doctor Alejandro para impedir que se case con Antonia y lo avienta desde el balcón. El padre Basilio es testigo de la muerte de Alejandro y culpa a Justino. Mariela busca la forma de que Max pague por su infidelidad.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Mariela y Malena se enteran de que la policía busca a Justino porque fue acusado de abuso. José María está confundido por las intrigas de Max y le reclama a Violeta que le haya mentido. Pantaleón esconde al único testigo de la muerte de Alejandro.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Gustavo se llena de esperanza al pensar que Ana Paula podría decidir quedarse con él. Vanesa rompe su sociedad con David para evitar que siga arruinando sus tierras. Rogelio lleva a cabo sus planes para adoptar a Margarito.

programme.title: La que no podía amar
programme.desc: Bruno lleva a cabo sus planes para deshacerse de David. Rogelio se molesta al saber que David fue el responsable de envenenar su ganado. Ana Paula decide alejarse de Rogelio y Gustavo. Vanesa emborracha a Rogelio para pasar la noche con él.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Dura confesión
programme.desc: Paola le confiesa a Paulina que planea regresar a casa de los Bracho. Cenobia logra salir de prisión y regresar al barrio. Carlos Daniel le exige a Paola que se aleje de su vida para siempre.

programme.title: La Gata: Apoyo maternal
programme.desc: Lorenza le pide a Pablo que se vaya con Esmeralda muy lejos antes de que Gisela les haga más daño. Inés quiere secuestrar a Esmeralda para conseguir dinero y escapar de la policía.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Una nueva jefa
programme.desc: Vanesa culpa a Elsa de haber matado a su padre. Cynthia se molesta al ver cómo Ana Paula ha comenzado a dar órdenes a los trabajadores de la hacienda. Miguel queda en libertad gracias a que no hay pruebas que demuestren que él mató a Maripaz.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Amor robado
programme.desc: Elena intenta convencer a Sandra de que se case con Damián. Alex descubre el escondite donde tienen encerrada a María José.

programme.title: La desalmada: Información secreta
programme.desc: David cree que Rafael le da información a Octavio sobre su campaña. La madre de Brenda la visita en la hacienda de Octavio para dividir la herencia de Alberto. César Franco le confiesa a Fernanda que está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Mentira descubierta
programme.desc: Alfonsina le reclama a Florencia por su mentira y ella se defiende, convenciéndola de que Elisa le quiere quitar a Damián.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Amor a medias
programme.desc: Ivana idea un nuevo plan para separar a Valentina de José Miguel. Leonor sospecha que Isabel está interesada en Federico. Isabel le pide a Ivana que la ayude a terminar con la relación de José Miguel y Valentina.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Del lado correcto
programme.desc: Darío le pide a Fabricio que mate a Eugenio, su padre. Victoria se entera de que Majo está embarazada. Adriana se niega a ser cómplice de José Luis.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y el Vítor hablan sobre el acoso. Rosita llega muy enojada a la casa porque el Chirris le faltó al respeto, Albertano y el Vítor van a enfrentarlo. El Chirris golpea al Vítor y lo deja inconsciente.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: El Vítor le dice a Albertano que usó sus revistas de lucha libre como papel de baño. El Vítor y Albertano ven el anuncio de un baile que habrá en el barrio y los dos quieren invitar a Rosita.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Con todas las medicinas que dejó Licha, Justito y Victoria crean un compuesto químico que Plutarco se toma por accidente. La Nena finge estar enferma para quedarse con el cuarto de Gaby.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido no encuentra empleo, por lo que prefiere quedarse cómodamente en su sofá, al igual que hace su padre. Plácido exige a los miembros de la familia que atiendan todos sus deseos para no levantarse del sofá, y ellos ya no lo soportan más.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido tiene la posibilidad de recuperar su antiguo trabajo pero don Justo le señala que ese puesto vacante sólo es para Aldolfo. Plutarco trabajará como sujeto de prueba de productos milagrosos.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido acaba de recordar que es su aniversario de bodas con Renata, por lo que le organizará una cena romántica. Martina invita al cine a la familia a ver el estreno de una película.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.sub-title: Una luz al fondo del tinaco
programme.desc: María intenta lavar el tanque de agua y queda atrapada en él. En el almacén, Carmelo juega con Delfino y Betza. Doña Lucha no sabe que María está dentro del tinaco y prende la bomba.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Tercer aniversario del coma de María, se apoya a San Hipoclorito arcángel, Albertano la recuerda y Doña Lucha se cree elegida, pide canonizar a Hipoclorito arcángel por milagroso y piensa que María debe morir, va al hospital y trata de desconectarla.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The old ladies selling their baskets full of vegetables and cheese on the Dolac market in Zagreb bring us back in time. At the market, we go from the breathtaking Mediterranean islands to the Austrian Alps, from freshly caught hake and simple Baltic snacks to internationally awarded cheese and a unique Turkey breed.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Food markets have a strong tradition in the Netherlands and many citizens count on their long street markets for their fresh food supplies. One of the oldest and most famous markets of the Netherlands is the Albert Cuyp Markt, a street market stretching along the upcoming (and "hip") neighborhood of de Pijp.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Arriving by boat to the Baltic Sea Harbor of Helsinki, it is the first building you see. Behind it, the square and the great dome of the city hall. The Old Market Hall (Wanha VanhaKauppahall) is a beautiful little 19th-century brick building with hi-varnish wooden stalls.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: "Mercado da Ribeira", in the Santos Area nearby Cais do Sodré train station, has been open since the 1800s and is the city's oldest marketplace. Here you can find all sorts of dairy products, fresh fish, vegetables, and fruits. It was refurbished in 2014 and it is now possible to eat gourmet signature meals there from the most quintessential chefs in Portugal.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The Viktualienmarkt developed from an original farmers' market to a popular market for gourmets. The market also hosts a number of traditional and folkloric events. But the center of the social life of the city is the world-famous Biergarten - here the seven historical breweries of the city pour the finest beers of the world.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Placed in the middle of Palermo's ancient streets, it is almost difficult to walk. All around there is a swarm of colors and perfumes. There is everything the Mediterranean island, so rich in agricultural traditions, has to offer. Street food here is a must, including dozens of roasted, salted, pickled, and fried specialties one can count on.

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: Ireland's third-largest city has one of Northern Europe's market gems: The English Market. It supplies high-quality food to affluent English families unlike the Irish market, which no longer exists. The best Irish produce today remains on the island and can be found here.
