programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Saseka Tented Camp, Thornybush Nature Reserve, Greater Kruger
programme.desc: Sika's seventh Safari destination is situated in the Greater Kruger area. Thornybush was one of the first Private Nature Reserves in South Africa. Set in the North-eastern portion of this Wilderness Paradise, Saseka Tented Camp is positioned on a distinct curve in the Monwana dry riverbed, which gently sweeps through this incredible landscape. A remarkable setting in the Wild that inspired visionary Designers & Architects, Silvio Rech and Lesley Carstens, to create a Safari Lodge that has a strikingly unique layout and finds a superb balance between cutting-edge design, Classical style and truly feeling connected to the outside environment.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: FiftySeven Waterberg, Welgevonden Game Reserve, Waterberg Biosphere
programme.desc: Ending off her Romantic Safari Adventure, Sika visits Welgevonden Game Reserve set in the spectacular Waterberg Biosphere district of South Africa's Limpopo Province. Her eighth destination FiftySeven Waterberg is one of the Country's finest Boutique Safari Lodges offering the unhindered gift of glorious Nature right on its doorstep. With a firm focus on Conservation efforts, Sika experience this Game Reserve on the forefront of proactive Conservation Management and also get to relax and enjoy warm hospitality in an Oasis of 5-star Luxury within the midst of the African Wilderness.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Gir National Park: India - Asia's Last Lion
programme.desc: In the west of India live wildcats which you wouldn't expect in India: lions. They live and roam freely in a surrounding where natives live as well. The Maldhari are proud to live in a region together with the lions, although they kill their cattle now and then. The north of Gujarat is mostly a desert where seminomads live. The Fakirani Jat breed a very special camel race: Karai-Camels which are able to swim. The camels swim daily around 3 kilometres to mangrove islands to feed.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Kinabatangan River: Borneo - Forgotten Paradise
programme.desc: The Kinabatangan winds for over 560 kilometres across the north of Borneo. Nowhere else in Sabah live as many wild and rare animals as along the river: Orang-Utans, Elephants, crocodiles and proboscis monkeys. But the biodiversity is endangered because more and more palm oil plantations replace the rainforest. The natives fight for the preservation of the forest and the unique wildlife.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Pu Mat National Park: Vietnam - Of Bears and Men
programme.desc: The jungle in the north of Vietnam is nearly impenetrable and there are parts where no human has ever set foot on before. The rainforest oft he Pu Mat Nationalpark is a retreat for threatened animals like the Asian black bear, pangonlins or rare species of monkeys. Tuan, a biologist and specialist for bears, explores the untouched regions of the nationalpark to find the black bear. The animals which are hunted the most are Pangolins. It is believed that their scale has healing power and their meat is considered a delicacy. A small vietnamese animal protection organisation fights for the suvival of this species.

programme.title: Asia
programme.sub-title: Secret Lives, Hidden Places - Great Gobi National Park: Mongolia - Following the Wild Camels
programme.desc: The Great Gobi Nationalpark in the southwest of Mongolia is home oft he most fascinationg mammals alive: the wild camels. The arcaic desert, impenetrable and misterious, ist he home of approximately 800 wild camels which are nearly extinct. The Gobi is one of the most sparsely populated areas around the world. We experience humans which live in the rough and misanthropic desert: Jangaa who breeds camels and specialises in camel polo Surendjav who owns a salt mine Erdene who built an oasis in the middle of the dessert.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa Blanchard into a match against a deadly mystery opponent. Adrenaline appears critically injured from being jumped by Exile and as such, her WOW World Tag Team Champion partner Fire is taking a stand. But it turns out the scorned Exile members aren't the only WOW Superheroes willing to deceive and harm the champs in pursuit of the tag team championship titles. Impressive newcomer and barrel riding champ, Casey Dakota makes her in ring debut. And the long history of battles that have ensued between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side members: Holidead, Siren, and the possessed Princess Aussie culminate into an all out war, resulting in the most shocking act that has ever taken place in WOW.

programme.title: Tropical Weightlessness
programme.desc: Gently sway in the tropical turquoise waters with a glimpse of blue sky and palm trees.

programme.title: Flying Over The Atlantic Ocean
programme.desc: Travel the majestic coasts of the Atlantic Ocean from a bird's-eye view.

programme.title: Chemin Pealey
programme.desc: Enjoy the view from rocky cliffs that overlook calm waters.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: The first ever feature length aerial Nature Relaxation™ film produced by David Huting, "Above the Fiji Islands" sweeps viewers on a stunning yet soothing aerial journey above many of Fiji's most iconic, exotic, and breathtakingly beautiful tropical islands - primarily in the Yasawas. Music is a custom extended length remix of "Sea Stars to Tristen" produced by Darshan Ambient filmed on the DJI Inspire1 Pro Drone with X5 Camera in January 2017.

programme.title: Pass Island: Phillipines
programme.desc: Invite paradise home with white sandy beaches and crystal-clear waters.

programme.title: Diamond Beach II: Indonesia
programme.desc: Often compared to the idyllic beach scenes of postcards, these shores and accompanying diamond-shaped cliffs that lend their name are sure to awe and inspire.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 2
programme.desc: Transport your senses to the rugged yet exquisitely beautiful Big Sur coast of California to relax & absorb the healing sights and sounds of McWay Falls from a unique and rare perspective. Filmed more than a decade ago and remastered for maximum color and quality, "A Day in Big Sur" showcases the timeless beauty of this magical destination and attempts to truly capture the spirit of this natural paradise through the use of 50+ artistically framed video perspectives - all featuring real stereo nature sounds for an immersive relaxation experience.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Living Creatures E2: Derby Dreams — Inspired by the Kentucky Derby, one of the most iconic horse races in the world, this collection is a celebration of the beauty, strength, and speed of these magnificent animals.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Living Creatures E1 — Embark on a whimsical journey through an art collection featuring cuddly, furry friends, enchanting scaly creatures, and fantastical beings. Each piece captivates with its unique charm, inviting viewers into a world where imagination knows no bounds.

programme.title: Autumn Harvest II
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest E2 — Immerse yourself in a kaleidoscope of fall foliage, where trees dance in radiant shades and leaves gently cascade in the crisp breeze. Delight in intricate still-life images capturing the essence of pumpkin spice and evoking a sense of nostalgia

programme.title: Halloween Party
programme.desc: Halloween Party S1E1 — Bold colors and haunting melodies bring out the magic of Halloween, inviting viewers to revel in the merriment of the holiday. From grinning skulls to moonlit scenes, the collection enchants with its lighthearted take on spooky.

programme.title: Pink Warriors
programme.desc: Pink Warriors S1E1 — This art collection captures unyielding power of women, mirroring the brave fight against breast cancer. The infusion of pink spreads awareness and celebrates the strength within every woman while the music adds an uplifting celebration of life.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now II
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Hispanic Artists Now III
programme.desc: Hispanic Artists Now E3 — This art collection of real & imagined landscapes, soulful abstract work, & vivid surrealist portraits offers a colorful exploration Hispanic culture. The music includes rhythmic electro, percussive afro-beats, & soft-house with a modern Latin edge.
